title: hieracium pallescens subsp. pseudomurrianum
intro: Hieracium pallescens subsp. pseudomurrianum, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Hieracium pallescens subsp. pseudomurrianum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
